requires.text: forall j: int {:trigger a[j]} :: 1 <= j < |a| ==> a[j] == b[2 * j - 1]
forall k: int {:trigger b[2 * k]} :: 1 <= k < |a| - 1 ==> b[2 * k] == b[2 * k - 1]
forall j: int {:trigger a[j]} :: 1 <= j < |a| ==> a[j] == b[2 * j - 1]
forall k: int {:trigger b[2 * k]} :: 1 <= k < |a| - 1 ==> b[2 * k] == b[2 * k - 1]

invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger partial[j]} :: 0 <= j < |partial| ==> partial[j] == b[2 * j + 1]

requires.text: forall k: int {:trigger b[2 * k]} :: 1 <= k < |b| / 2 ==> b[2 * k] == b[2 * k - 1]
forall k: int {:trigger b[2 * k]} :: 1 <= k < |b| / 2 ==> b[2 * k] == b[2 * k - 1]
